category_sources: source_facts.description says the CLI interacts with Chainloop; official GitHub README describes Chainloop as an evidence store for software supply-chain attestations, SBOMs, VEX, SARIF, and policy enforcement.
display_name_sources: source_facts.name is chainloop-cli; official Chainloop docs page title and CLI reference identify the command-line interface.
docs_sources: source_facts.homepage is the official documentation site; official Chainloop README links to docs.chainloop.dev and the command-line reference documents the CLI.
repo_sources: source_facts.repo already contains https://github.com/chainloop-dev/chainloop; per instruction, repo is returned as null and not re-evaluated.
tags_sources: source_facts.description identifies a CLI; official Chainloop README topics and description reference security, compliance, attestation, SBOM, in-toto, SLSA, and supply-chain security.
